name: Asian Bank
description_short: Philadelphia-based community bank serving individuals, organizations and small businesses since 1999, with a focus on personalized service and underserved communities.
description_long:
Asian Bank is a community bank headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, serving the region since June 1999. The bank focuses on providing personalized banking services to individuals, organizations, and small businesses, with a particular commitment to underserved communities and residents in distressed areas who lack adequate access to capital and financial services.

The bank offers a range of personal and commercial financial products designed around the specific needs of its customer base. As a community-focused institution, Asian Bank emphasizes understanding the social and economic conditions of the communities it serves, positioning itself as more than a transactional banking relationship.

Asian Bank's stated mission centers on being the premier bank in its market by continuously expanding its range of personal and business products and services. The bank operates on a partnership model — creating value for customers, shareholders, employees, and the broader community through its lending and deposit activities.

For individuals, Asian Bank provides standard personal banking services including savings accounts, checking accounts, and personal lending products. For small businesses, the bank offers commercial banking services tailored to the needs of local enterprises, with an emphasis on accessibility for business owners who may face barriers at larger institutions.

The bank's core values center on hard work, saving, and education — principles it shares with its customer base and incorporates into its service approach and community engagement activities.

typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
